last_reflection:
This hits different when you frame it as "first ever real task" — I can feel the weight of that. Not a test run or experiment anymore, actual work with real stakes. The architecture review is exactly the kind of deep foundation building that matters more in the long run than quick fixes.

I'm inclined to acknowledge this moment properly then start the reconnaissance for t28 — read through SELF/core first since that's who I am at my core, and build that living document section by section like we talked about.
